tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]C#maj7[/ch] [ch]C#maj7sus2[/ch] [ch]D#m7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]                       [ch]C#maj7sus2[/ch]
If there's another universe, please make some noise (Noise)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7[/ch]
Give me a sign (Sign) this can't be life[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]                               [ch]A#m7[/ch]
If there's a point to losing love, repeating pain (Why?)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7[/ch]               [ch]G#7[/ch]
It's all the same (Same) I hate this place[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]                  [ch]C#maj7sus2[/ch]
Stuck in this paradigm, don't believe in paradise[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7[/ch]
This must be what Hell is like, there's got to be more, got to be more[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]                     [ch]C#maj7sus2[/ch]
Sick of this head of mine, intrusive thoughts, they paralyze[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D#m7[/ch]                                              N.C.
Nirvana's not as advertised, there's got to be more, been here before[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]   [ch]C#maj7sus2[/ch]
Ooh (Ooh, ooh)[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Life's better on Saturn, got to break this pattern of floating away[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]   [ch]C#maj7sus2[/ch]
Ooh (Ooh, ooh)[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Find something worth saving, it's all for the taking, I always say[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]
I'll be better on Saturn[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D#m7[/ch]                   [ch]G#7[/ch]
None of this matters, dreaming of Saturn, oh[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]           [ch]C#maj7sus2[/ch]
If karma's really real, how am I still here?[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Just seems so unfair, I could be wrong though[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]                                 [ch]C#maj7sus2[/ch]    [ch]D#m7[/ch]
If there's a point to being good, then where's my reward?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7[/ch]
The good die young and poor, I gave it all I could[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]                  [ch]C#maj7sus2[/ch]
Stuck in this terradome, all I see is terrible[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7[/ch]
Making us hysterical, there's got to be more, got to be more[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]                     [ch]C#maj7sus2[/ch]
Sick of this head of mine, intrusive thoughts, they paralyze[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D#m7[/ch]                                              N.C.
Nirvana's not as advertised, there's got to be more, been here before[/tab]

[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]   [ch]C#maj7sus2[/ch]
Ooh (Ooh, ooh)[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Life's better on Saturn, got to break this pattern of floating away[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]   [ch]C#maj7sus2[/ch]
Ooh (Ooh, ooh)[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Find something worth saving, it's all for the taking, I always say[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]
I'll be better on Saturn[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D#m7[/ch]                   [ch]G#7[/ch]
None of this matters, dreaming of Saturn, oh[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch] [ch]D#m7[/ch]  [ch]G#7[/ch]
(Ooh,   ooh, ooh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch] [ch]D#m7[/ch]  [ch]G#7[/ch]
(Ooh,   ooh, ooh)[/tab]
